profile:summary: Yubi (Yuba Raj Khadka) is a Senior Software and AI Engineer based in Melbourne, Australia. He specialises in applied AI and LLM systems, scalable backend architecture, and production-grade cloud infrastructure. His work spans LLM integrations, RAG pipelines, agent workflows, real-time streaming systems, and end-to-end backend engineering, with a strong focus on reliability, performance, and practical product delivery. He is currently an AI Engineer at Future Secure AI, where he helps enterprise customers deploy AI agents across multiple platforms and contributes to multi-agent and multi-model systems. Before that, he worked at FifthDomain building backend and AI-powered systems for a cybersecurity training and assessment platform serving government, defence, and university clients. He holds a Master of Information Technology from La Trobe University with High Distinction, a BSc (Hons) in Computing from London Metropolitan University, and certifications including AWS Certified Developer - Associate, RHCE, and RHCSA.
profile:skills:
AI & LLM: LLM integrations, OpenAI Realtime API, OpenAI Assistants API, RAG, prompt engineering, context engineering, Model Context Protocol (MCP), agent architectures, single-agent and multi-agent patterns, streaming (SSE, chunked HTTP, WebSocket).
Backend: Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, GraphQL, AppSync, REST APIs, FastAPI, event-driven architectures.
Cloud & Infra: AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, AWS CDK, Google Cloud Run, Vercel.
Data: DynamoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis.
DevOps & Observability: CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code, CloudWatch, Grafana, Loki.
projects:top:
1. MCP Terminal Portfolio - yubi.sh (Talk to Yubi): Yubi's flagship personal portfolio project and one of the projects he is most proud of. The goal is to let visitors explore his skills, projects, and experience through natural conversation instead of a static portfolio. It combines a terminal-style interface with voice interaction, a custom MCP server with intent-based tool routing, and streaming responses for a more conversational and memorable experience. It uses the OpenAI Realtime API for real-time voice with fallback to turn-based pipelines, Server-Sent Events for streaming, Vercel for the frontend and FastAPI client, and Google Cloud Run for the MCP server. It also includes observability with Vercel Analytics, Grafana, and Loki, plus concurrency controls for websocket-based voice sessions.

2. Conor AI (FifthDomain): LLM-powered assistant integrated into product workflows for cybersecurity challenges, assessments, and competitions. It helps users get unstuck while staying within platform guardrails. Built with contextual response flows, streaming through AWS Lambda, and controls to keep outputs safe and relevant in-platform.

3. MatchCast - AI Audio Analysis System: Full-stack AI match analysis project that generated match analysis with an LLM and converted it into audio using text-to-speech. Included caching and optimisation work to keep latency and cost predictable.

4. Bedrock Agent - Event Creation System (FifthDomain): AWS Bedrock Agent with Lambda action groups that converted natural-language requests into validated event creation workflows, replacing manual multi-step admin flows. Designed schemas, prompt scaffolding, and backend tool handling for reliable execution.

5. NL Query Agent - Multi-Agent Pipeline (FifthDomain): Three-agent architecture built on AWS Strands that translated analyst questions into executable queries. The pipeline separated analysis, planning, and execution responsibilities to keep the system structured and reliable.
profile:experience:
AI Engineer - Future Secure AI (Apr 2026 - Present): Helps enterprise customers deploy AI agents across multiple platforms. Builds backend AI systems using Node.js, LangChain, LangGraph, and Flowise, contributes to scalable multi-agent and multi-model architectures, and evaluates emerging AI technologies.

Senior Backend Developer - FifthDomain (Dec 2024 - Jan 2026): Designed and delivered LLM-powered systems and scalable backend architecture. Shipped Conor AI, built AWS serverless systems with CDK, Lambda, AppSync, and DynamoDB, implemented secure multi-tenant architecture, and improved platform reliability.

Software Engineer - FifthDomain (Jul 2022 - Dec 2024): Built backend systems with Node.js, GraphQL, and AWS. Established CI/CD workflows, improved deployment processes, and helped modernise the platform.

Junior Software Engineer - FifthDomain (Jun 2021 - Jul 2022): Contributed to platform development and migration work, helping build early platform capabilities.
